Sound familiar?

Still tracking hours
in a spreadsheet?

Most contractors waste hours every month piecing together timesheets, manually calculating GST, and formatting invoices. By the time you send the invoice, you've forgotten half the shifts. There's a better way.

Why Invairo

Everything you need.
Nothing you don't.

📱

Built for mobile, always

Log a shift straight from your phone in under 10 seconds. No laptop, no spreadsheets — just open the app, tap, done.

🧾

GST-ready invoices

Generate compliant Australian tax invoices with GST, your ABN, and client details in one tap.

👥

Multiple clients

Track hours and rates across multiple clients without switching apps or losing track of who owes what.

📊

Know your earnings

See daily, weekly, and monthly totals at a glance. Always know exactly how much you've earned and with which client.

📄

Professional PDFs

Send clean, branded PDF invoices your clients will take seriously. Ready to email in seconds.

🔒

Secure cloud sync

Your data is encrypted and synced across devices. Never lose a timesheet again.

How it works

Up and running in minutes

01

Create your account

Sign up in 30 seconds. No credit card, no commitment. Start your full 30-day free trial immediately.

02

Add clients & log shifts

Create your first client, set your hourly rate, and start logging shifts straight from your phone.

03

Generate & send invoices

When payday comes, tap "Generate Invoice" and send a professional GST-compliant PDF in seconds.

Payments & Security

Your payment is always safe

We use Stripe — the same payment infrastructure trusted by Amazon, Google, and millions of businesses worldwide.

🔐

SSL encrypted

All data is transmitted over HTTPS. Your payment information is fully encrypted end-to-end.

🏦

No card data stored

Your card details go directly to Stripe. We never see, touch, or store your payment information.

🛡️

PCI DSS compliant

Stripe is certified to PCI Level 1 — the highest global standard for payment security.

Payments secured by stripe

FAQ

Common questions

Is Invairo designed for sole traders in Australia?

Yes. Invairo is built specifically for Australian sole traders, freelancers, and independent contractors. Your invoices include your ABN, GST, and are formatted to meet ATO requirements.

Can I generate GST invoices with Invairo?

Absolutely. Invairo generates compliant Australian tax invoices including GST, your business name, ABN, and client details. Export as PDF and send directly to your client.

Is there a free plan?

Yes — you get a full 30-day free trial with no credit card required. After that, time tracking stays free forever. Upgrade to Solo ($5 AUD/month) or Pro ($10 AUD/month) to continue invoicing.

Does it work on iPhone and Android?

Yes. Invairo works on any smartphone browser — iPhone, Android, or desktop. No app download required.

Can I track time for multiple clients?

Yes. The Pro plan supports unlimited clients and products. The Solo plan supports 1 client. You can upgrade at any time as your workload grows.

How is Invairo different from Harvest or TSheets?

Harvest and TSheets are built for teams and agencies with complex per-seat pricing. Invairo is built for solo workers — simpler, faster, and just $5–10 AUD/month with no per-seat fees.

Ready to get paid on time?

Join contractors who use Invairo to stay organised and invoice like a pro.
